hero.title: Engineering Systems That Scale
hero.subtitle: Software ea Khoebo · AI & Machine Learning · Cloud Infrastructure · IoT & Edge
hero.description: Ho tloha ho boiketsetso bo bohlale ho ea ho li-platform tsa leru, re theha le ho fana ka theknoloji e matlafatsang likhoebo tse nang le takatso e matla — ka nako, ka tekanyetso, ka boholo.
hero.trustLine: Lik'hamphani tse tšepahalang lefatšeng ka bophara

services.subtitle: Litšebeletso tsa rona
services.title: Boenjiniere bo felletseng ba spectrum
services.description: Libaka tse tšeletseng tsa ho ikoetlisa. Sehlopha se le seng. Karolo e 'ngoe le e' ngoe ea theknoloji ea hau e na le li-stack — ho tloha ho lisebelisoa tsa bohale ho ea ho li-dashboard tsa khoebo.

customSoftware.title: Tloaelo Software Development
customSoftware.description: Likopo tsa sejoale-joale tse hahiloeng ka li-microservices, li-API le meralo ea leru.

aiMl.title: AI, ML le Bohlale ba Khoebo
aiMl.description: Lipeipi tsa AI / ML, li-dashboard tsa Power BI, le li-analytics tse tsoetseng pele tse fetolang data hore e be liqeto.

cloud.title: Cloud Architecture & Infrastructure
cloud.description: Lisebelisoa tsa maru a mangata tse nang le lijana, tse se nang seva le scalability ea lefats'e e hahelletsoeng kahare.

iot.title: IoT & Edge Computing
iot.description: Lisebelisoa tse hokahaneng, mafahla a dijithale, le likhomphutha tsa bohale bakeng sa indasteri ea 4.0.

devops.title: Boenjiniere ba DevOps le Platform
devops.description: Lipeipi tsa CI / CD, meralo ea motheo e le khoutu, le ho shebella ho tloha boitlamo ho ea tlhahisong.

digital.title: Phetoho ea dijithale le boeletsi
digital.description: Leano la theknoloji, limmapa tsa sejoale-joale le boeletsi ba matsoho.

cta.title: Haha Ho Ho Serious
cta.description: Ho tloha nts'etsopele ea software ea moetlo le tharollo e tsamaisoang ke AI ho isa ho meralo ea motheo ea leru le boiketsetso — re fana ka lits'ebeletso tsa theknoloji tsa ho qetela tse lumellanang le litlhoko tsa hau.

credibility.subtitle: Rekoto ea rona ea Track
credibility.title: Liphetho, eseng <gradient>litšepiso</gradient>
credibility.description: Ho tloha Sarajevo ho ea Oslo, Amsterdam le Berlin. Ts'ebetso ea k'hamphani e tsamaisoa ka nako, nako le nako.

atlascopco.label: Cloud IAM bakeng sa Atlas Copco
atlascopco.outcome: Theha meralo ea pele ea leru e thehiloeng marung bakeng sa Atlas Copco ho Azure Kubernetes, ho fokotsa litšenyehelo ha u ntse u boloka ho latela khoebo.

orange.label: Sethala sa Orange Cyberdefense
orange.outcome: E ntlafalitse meralo ea motheo ea Azure Kubernetes, lipeipi tsa CI / CD, le kopanyo ea tloaelo ea ServiceNow bakeng sa feme e etelletseng pele ea ts'ireletso ea ts'ireletso ea Europe.

telecom.label: Telecom GIS & AR Platform
telecom.outcome: E hahiloe 'mapa oa sethala sa GIS ho pholletsa le Jeremane ka ho lemoha ho thulana ho thibela tšenyo ea meralo ea motheo ea li-euro tse limilione tse ngata.

iot.label: Cloud IoT & Edge Platform
iot.outcome: Azure IoT Hub e tsamaisa lisebelisoa tse likete, Synapse e sebetsana le mela e limilione tse likete ea telemetry, ka ho bokella bohale ho fokotsa litšenyehelo tsa melaetsa ka ~ 90%.

drone.label: Sethala sa Drone se ikemetseng
drone.outcome: Motsamaisi oa sefofane ea moetlo o nang le borokho ba 4G-to-Azure IoT Hub bo nolofalletsang lifofane tse ikemetseng tsa BVLOS bakeng sa ho lekola temo le ho tsamaisa mojaro.

payment.label: Pholoso ea Sistimi ea Tefo
payment.outcome: Pholosoa heke ea tefo e hlolehang bakeng sa ts'ebeliso ea mehala ea Norway ka ho khutlisetsa morao khoutu ea lefa e sa ngolisoeng. Nako ea ho theoha ea zero kamora ntlafatso.

game.label: AAA Game Dev Tooling
game.outcome: E hahiloe plugin ea Maya e fokotsang nako ea 3D le animation ka 50% studio se seholo sa AAA, e amohetsoeng e le sesebelisoa se tloaelehileng ho phaephe ea tlhahiso.

social.label: Sethala sa Sechaba se thehiloeng sebakeng
social.outcome: Sesebelisoa sa ho laetsana bakeng sa bophelo ba bosiu ba Spain ka ho bapisa geolocation, melaetsa ea nako ea nnete, le litsebiso tsa push bakeng sa moreki oa UK.

iga.label: Multi-Tenant IGA Platform
iga.outcome: E hahiloe backend ea mantlha bakeng sa sethala sa taolo ea boitsebahatso ba leru se sebeletsang bareki ba Fortune 500 ka tloaelo ea ASP.NET Core Identity bakeng sa NoSQL boemong ba khoebo.

euAdjacent.title: EU-Adjacent, Global Delivery
euAdjacent.description: Lihora tsa ho sebetsa tsa CET tse nang le boiphihlelo bo fetang Norway, Netherlands, Jeremane le ho feta.

yourEngineers.title: Moenjiniere oa hau, eseng morekisi
yourEngineers.description: Litho tsa sehlopha tse inehetseng tse kenyellelitsoeng ts'ebetsong ea hau ea mosebetsi le lisebelisoa. Ha ho na batsamaisi ba ak'haonte, ha ho na mela ea litekete.

hardwareToCloud.title: Hardware ho Cloud
hardwareToCloud.description: Ho tloha ho firmware ea sesebelisoa se kentsoeng ho ea ho lipeipi tsa khoebo tsa Azure Synapse. Software e felletseng ho pholletsa le karolo e 'ngoe le e' ngoe.

partners.subtitle: Stack ea Theknoloji
partners.title: <gradient>Stack</gradient> e lekiloeng ke ntoa
partners.description: Ha re sebelise lisebelisoa tsena feela — re rometse litsamaiso tsa tlhahiso le tsona. Ho tloha Microsoft Azure ho ea ho Kubernetes, baenjiniere ba rona ba na le boiphihlelo ba 'nete.

cloudInfra.label: Cloud & Infrastructure
cloudInfra.description: Meralo ea maru a mangata e nang le orchestration ea setshelo le meralo ea motheo e le khoutu.

frontend.label: Frontend
frontend.description: Lisebelisoa tsa sejoale-joale tsa likarolo tse nang le ts'ireletso ea mofuta le lisebelisoa tse ntlafalitsoeng tsa kaho.

backend.label: Backend & APIs
backend.description: Liforomo tsa seva tsa maemo a khoebo, lipuo tsa sistimi le li-paradigms tsa sejoale-joale tsa API.

data.label: Boitsebiso le polokelo
data.description: Likamano, litokomane le mehopolo ea polokelo ka patlo e felletseng ea mongolo.

devops.label: DevOps & Tooling
devops.description: Lipeipi tsa CI / CD, taolo ea phetolelo, le tlhahiso ea moqapi.

cloudNative.title: Cloud Native ka Default
cloudNative.description: Morero o mong le o mong o kenngoa ka likonteraka, o khannoang ke CI / CD, 'me o hahiloe bakeng sa tekanyo e tshekaletseng ho tloha ka letsatsi la pele.

fullStack.title: Full-Stack Fluency
fullStack.description: Ho tloha ho li-frontends tsa React ho ea ho li-microservices tsa .NET ho lihlopha tsa Kubernetes — sehlopha se le seng, qetellong ho isa qetellong.

productionProven.title: Tlhahiso e netefalitsoeng
productionProven.description: Ha se theknoloji ea demo. Sesebelisoa se seng le se seng se thathamisitsoeng se matlafatsa litsamaiso tsa 'nete tse sebeletsang basebelisi ba 'nete kajeno.

faq.subtitle: Motheo oa Tsebo
faq.title: Lipotso tse botsoang <gradient>khafetsa</gradient>
faq.description: Ntho e ngoe le e ngoe eo u hlokang ho e tseba mabapi le ho sebetsa le Horizon Tech

scope.question: Sebaka sa hau sa mosebetsi ke sefe?
scope.answer: Re fana ka merero ea theknoloji ea ho qetela: software ea khoebo ea moetlo, lipeipi tsa AI / ML, meralo ea motheo ea leru, lits'ebetso tsa IoT, boiketsetso ba DevOps, le boeletsi ba phetoho ea dijithale. Hore na o hloka sethala se felletseng se hahiloeng ho tloha qalong kapa kopanyo e lebisitsoeng le stack ea hau e teng, re sebetsana le meralo, nts'etsopele, liteko le ts'ebetso.

stack.question: Theknoloji ea hau ea mantlha ke efe?
stack.answer: Stack ea rona ea mantlha e shebane le li-platform tsa maemo a khoebo: Azure le AWS bakeng sa leru, .NET le Node.js bakeng sa backend, React le Angular bakeng sa frontend, Kubernetes le Docker bakeng sa orchestration, le Terraform bakeng sa meralo ea motheo e le khoutu. Re boetse re sebetsa haholo le Python bakeng sa mesebetsi ea AI / ML, Power BI le Fabric bakeng sa bohlale ba khoebo, le PostgreSQL, SQL Server le MongoDB bakeng sa data.

enterprise.question: U sebetsana joang le merero ea khoebo?
enterprise.answer: Boitlamo bo bong le bo bong bo qala ka mohato oa ho sibolla ho hlalosa sebaka, meralo le mehato ea bohlokoa. U fumana sehlopha se inehetseng se nang le tataiso ea tekheniki, tlhahlobo ea khafetsa ea bohlokoa, le phihlello e tobileng ho baenjiniere ba hahang sistimi ea hau. Re latela li-sprints tsa agile le li-demos tsa bankakarolo, re boloka liboto tsa projeke tse hlakileng, mme re fana ka litlaleho tsa tsoelo-pele tsa beke le beke.

support.question: Ts'ehetso ea kamora ho tsebisoa e shebahala joang?
support.answer: Re fana ka mekhahlelo ea ts'ehetso e hlophisitsoeng e nang le li-SLA tse hlalositsoeng, ho kenyeletsoa ho lekola 24/7, karabelo ea liketsahalo, ntlafatso ea ts'ebetso le phetoho ea likarolo. Litumellano tsa rona tsa ts'ehetso li akaretsa litokiso tsa likokoanyana, li-patches tsa ts'ireletso, ho lekanya meralo ea motheo le tlhahlobo ea bophelo bo botle — e lumellanang le litlhoko tsa hau tsa nako ea ho qetela le nako ea karabelo.

integration.question: A na u ka kopanya le lisebelisoa tsa rona tse teng?
integration.answer: Ho joalo. Re khethehile ho ntlafatso ea lefa, likhokahano tsa pele tsa API, le ho falla ha leru la lebasetere. Hore na o hloka ho hokela lits'ebetso tsa ERP tse fumanehang marang-rang, ho tloha ho li-monoliths ho ea ho li-microservices, kapa ho kopanya li-database tsa lefa le li-frontend tsa sejoale-joale, re na le libuka tsa lipapali tsa ho falla le boiphihlelo ba kopanyo ho e etsa hore e se na sekoli.

industries.question: U sebelitse liindastering life?
industries.answer: Sehlopha sa rona se fane ka merero ho pholletsa le fintech, tlhokomelo ea bophelo bo botle, thepa, e-commerce, matla le mmuso. Re utloisisa litlhoko tse ikhethileng tsa indasteri joalo ka PCI-DSS bakeng sa litefo, lintlha tsa HIPAA bakeng sa tlhaiso-leseling ea bophelo bo botle, ho latela GDPR bakeng sa mebaraka ea EU, le telemetry ea nako ea nnete bakeng sa IoT ea indasteri.

engagement.question: Ts'ebetso ea boitlamo e shebahala joang?
engagement.answer: E qala ka mohala oa ho sibolla ho utloisisa lipheo tsa hau le boemo ba mahlale. Ho tloha moo, re fana ka tokomane ea scoping e nang le likhothaletso tsa meralo, kemiso ea nako le ho senyeha ha matsete. Hang ha re amoheloa, re qala ka sehlopha se inehetseng, re kena ka har'a lisebelisoa tsa hau le lits'ebetso tsa hau, ebe re qala sprint ea pele matsatsing a seng makae.

faq.stillHaveQuestions: Na u ntse u na le lipotso?
faq.ctaDescription: Na u na le projeke ka kelellong? Ha re bueng ka boholo, kemiso ea nako le moralo oa lichelete.
faq.readCaseStudies: Bala lithuto tsa rona tsa linyeoe
